calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Reef Monostrategy Break -- Behavioral Diversity Validation
items.notes: Heuristic-policy behavioral probe. Three-arm: baseline vs reef+food-attracted vs reef-only. C1/C2/C3 must PASS before V3-EXQ-523 (SD-029 C2/C3 with trained agent). Gated on V3-EXQ-521 PASS 2026-05-04.
